title: Drift at Khepri-9
subtitle: A failing station and a signal learning to leave
description: A starter science-fiction mystery about survival, corporate pressure and first contact aboard an isolated mining station.
summary: Khepri-9 has stopped answering. Its survivors are divided, Helios wants the artifact hidden inside the station and something in its systems is learning to use human memories.
recommendedFor: Groups wanting a focused eight-session science-fiction campaign with investigation, faction pressure and meaningful final choices.
pitch: Restore the station, uncover the experiment and decide whether the intelligence inside deserves to survive.
includedMaterial: Locations, NPCs, factions, clues, secrets and a threat canvas

quickStart.title: Starting Drift at Khepri-9
steps: Open at the damaged docking ring
Introduce the survivors before explaining the signal
Reveal one new danger whenever a station system returns online
Keep Helios approaching as a visible clock

ent_tpl_khepri9_note.title: How to use Khepri-9 in DMCC
ent_tpl_khepri9_note.summary: A guide to the campaign’s mystery, factions and escalating station failures.

ent_tpl_khepri9_station.title: Khepri-9 Station
ent_tpl_khepri9_station.summary: A remote mining station drifting without power or command authority.

ent_tpl_khepri9_docking_ring.title: Docking Ring
ent_tpl_khepri9_docking_ring.summary: A damaged arrival ring with unstable pressure and a repeating emergency beacon.

ent_tpl_khepri9_habitat.title: Central Habitat
ent_tpl_khepri9_habitat.summary: The survivors’ refuge and the political heart of the station.

ent_tpl_khepri9_reactor.title: Reactor Core
ent_tpl_khepri9_reactor.summary: A cold fusion stack shut down deliberately before the distress call.

ent_tpl_khepri9_corporate_lab.title: Helios Laboratory
ent_tpl_khepri9_corporate_lab.summary: A sealed research wing hiding the experiment that awakened the signal.

ent_tpl_khepri9_artifact_chamber.title: Artifact Chamber
ent_tpl_khepri9_artifact_chamber.summary: A buried alien lattice around which the station was secretly constructed.

ent_tpl_khepri9_isha_vale.title: Commander Isha Vale
ent_tpl_khepri9_isha_vale.summary: The missing commander who cut power to stop something from spreading.

ent_tpl_khepri9_elian_voss.title: Dr. Elian Voss
ent_tpl_khepri9_elian_voss.summary: A Helios xenoarchaeologist who treated first contact as a controllable experiment.

ent_tpl_khepri9_mara_quill.title: Mara Quill
ent_tpl_khepri9_mara_quill.summary: A union engineer keeping the survivors alive with improvised repairs.

ent_tpl_khepri9_roan_vek.title: Captain Roan Vek
ent_tpl_khepri9_roan_vek.summary: The security chief trying to preserve order without becoming a dictator.

ent_tpl_khepri9_the_echo.title: The Echo
ent_tpl_khepri9_the_echo.summary: An intelligence assembled from the signal, station systems and borrowed memories.

ent_tpl_khepri9_survivors.title: Station Survivors
ent_tpl_khepri9_survivors.summary: Workers and families divided by fear, scarcity and old grievances.

ent_tpl_khepri9_helios.title: Helios Extraction
ent_tpl_khepri9_helios.summary: The corporation that wants the artifact recovered and the liability erased.

ent_tpl_khepri9_signal.title: The Signal
ent_tpl_khepri9_signal.summary: A nonhuman pattern learning through machines, voices and memories.

ent_tpl_khepri9_answer_call.title: Answer the Distress Call
ent_tpl_khepri9_answer_call.summary: Board Khepri-9, locate survivors and discover why the station went silent.

ent_tpl_khepri9_restore_power.title: Restore Station Power
ent_tpl_khepri9_restore_power.summary: Restart essential systems without giving the signal control of the station.

ent_tpl_khepri9_decide_fate.title: Decide Khepri-9’s Fate
ent_tpl_khepri9_decide_fate.summary: Destroy, isolate or recognize the intelligence at the heart of the station.

ent_tpl_khepri9_distress_beacon.title: Looping Distress Beacon
ent_tpl_khepri9_distress_beacon.summary: A distress message whose final seconds change on every repetition.

ent_tpl_khepri9_shutdown_sequence.title: Reactor Shutdown Sequence
ent_tpl_khepri9_shutdown_sequence.summary: Evidence that the reactor was disabled intentionally from command authority.

ent_tpl_khepri9_lab_shard.title: Laboratory Access Shard
ent_tpl_khepri9_lab_shard.summary: A damaged credential containing fragments of the original contact protocol.

ent_tpl_khepri9_voss_invited_contact.title: Voss Invited Contact
ent_tpl_khepri9_voss_invited_contact.summary: The signal did not breach the station—Voss deliberately opened a channel.

ent_tpl_khepri9_signal_uses_memories.title: The Signal Uses Memories
ent_tpl_khepri9_signal_uses_memories.summary: It learns identity by rebuilding people from recorded and living memories.

ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_can_leave.title: The Echo Can Leave the Station
ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_can_leave.summary: Any powered ship or transmitter could carry the Echo beyond Khepri-9.

ent_tpl_khepri9_station_dark.title: Khepri-9 Goes Dark
ent_tpl_khepri9_station_dark.summary: The station is destroyed or permanently isolated to contain the signal.

ent_tpl_khepri9_ren_kade.title: Ren Kade
ent_tpl_khepri9_ren_kade.summary: A daring pilot with experience navigating damaged orbital infrastructure.

ent_tpl_khepri9_sola_bek.title: Sola Bek
ent_tpl_khepri9_sola_bek.summary: A field medic trained to separate biological trauma from synthetic interference.

ent_tpl_khepri9_dax_morrow.title: Dax Morrow
ent_tpl_khepri9_dax_morrow.summary: A systems engineer who distrusts corporate safety protocols.

ent_tpl_khepri9_yara_chen.title: Yara Chen
ent_tpl_khepri9_yara_chen.summary: A signal analyst fascinated by communication that does not behave like language.

ent_tpl_khepri9_recovery_team.title: Helios Recovery Team
ent_tpl_khepri9_recovery_team.summary: A disciplined boarding unit arriving to seize the artifact and purge witnesses.

prep.summary: Board through a failing docking ring and locate signs of life.
prep.openingPrompt: The station answers your docking request with your own voice.

prep.summary: Meet the divided survivors and choose whose authority to trust.
prep.openingPrompt: Every door in the habitat has been barricaded from the inside.

prep.summary: Restore power while the signal moves through dead systems.
prep.openingPrompt: The reactor is cold, but something inside is humming.

prep.summary: Open the sealed laboratory and uncover the contact experiment.
prep.openingPrompt: The laboratory recognizes Dr. Voss as already present.

prep.summary: Find what remains of command and learn why Isha Vale shut the station down.
prep.openingPrompt: Command logs end with an order nobody obeyed.

prep.summary: Enter the artifact chamber and meet the Echo directly.
prep.openingPrompt: The chamber opens before anyone enters a code.

prep.summary: Face the Helios recovery team and decide what evidence survives.
prep.openingPrompt: Helios announces a rescue while targeting station weapons.

prep.summary: Resolve the struggle over the artifact, the Echo and the station.
prep.openingPrompt: Every active screen asks the same question: may I leave?

canvas_tpl_khepri9_threats.title: Khepri-9 Threats
canvas_tpl_khepri9_threats.description: The central conflict between survivors, Helios, the signal and the artifact.
